title: Les smattes
overview: In this French Canadian film, when the provincial government tries to move two young farmers from their land to make way for development, the two fight back, accidentally killing a policeman and becoming outlaws in the process.

trailers.title: Les Smattes, la bande annonce, par Jean Claude Labrecque - 1971
